name: WebPT Physical Therapy EHR API
what_it_does: WebPT REST API for outpatient physical therapy, occupational therapy, and speech therapy EHR and practice management platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient intake and rehab clinical records, handle appointment scheduling and waitlist management, access physical therapy documentation and treatment notes, process PT/OT/SLP billing and insurance claims, manage outcomes data and functional assessments, retrieve practice analytics, integrate with exercise prescription tools, and connect therapy data with physician referral and health system partners.
use_cases: Managing therapy patient records and episode of care from clinical coordination agents
Processing PT/OT/SLP billing and insurance claims from revenue cycle agents
Accessing outcomes data and functional assessments from quality reporting agents
Managing physician referrals and authorization tracking from intake agents
not_for: Inpatient hospital rehabilitation without outpatient therapy clinic focus
Mental health therapy without physical/occupational therapy workflows
Wellness studios without licensed physical or occupational therapy practice
best_when: An outpatient physical therapy, occupational therapy, or speech therapy clinic using WebPT wants AI agents to automate scheduling, documentation, billing, outcomes reporting, and referral management.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Physical and occupational therapy clinical records are PHI. Authorization and billing automation requires compliance oversight. Outcomes data automation must maintain clinical accuracy. BAA required.

auth.notes: WebPT uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Clinic-level credentials with patient, clinical, and billing scopes. Developer partner program for integrations. FHIR for interoperability with health systems. Strong marketplace of integrated partners.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — outpatient therapy enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-clinician monthly pricing; enterprise pricing for therapy chains
pricing.notes: Phoenix, Arizona. Founded 2008. Market leader for outpatient physical therapy EHR. 150,000+ PT, OT, SLP users. 75,000+ clinicians. PE-backed (Thomas H. Lee Partners). Dominant for independent PT clinics. Competes with Clinicient and Netsmart for therapy management. Outcomes tracking differentiator.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: PT/OT/SLP clinical records are PHI — BAA required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer partner program
Prior authorization tracking is complex — payer-specific rules require careful automation
Outcomes measurement data (FOTO, DASH, etc.) has standardized formats requiring validation
FHIR available for health system integrations — preferred for bi-directional data exchange
Medicare billing for therapy services (MPPR, functional limitation reporting) is complex
agent_readiness.security_notes: Physical therapy PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 scoped. US data residency. BAA required. Medicare therapy billing compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: PT/OT PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2. US data residency. BAA required.
